title: henckelia peduncularis
intro: Henckelia peduncularis, also known as the Gentianella alpina or the Alpines gentian, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It is a perennial plant that is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Henckelia peduncularis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are taken to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
